message:
Command `
# Wait - why is the run_dir not showing step 71? Let me check
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Full run dir listing ==="
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | tail -15

echo ""
echo "=== Latest steps ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/" | grep "^d" | sort -t'-' -k1 -n | tail -8

echo ""
echo "=== Pipe drainer running? ==="
ps aux | grep "LIBPID\|drt2_pipe\|pipe_path" | grep -v grep | head -5

echo ""
echo "=== Pipe drain log ==="
wc -l /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null
tail -20 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== OpenROAD status ==="
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "CPU:"$3"%","TIME:"$10}'
` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
# Wait - why is the run_dir not showing step 71? Let me check
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Full run dir listing ==="
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | tail -15

echo ""
echo "=== Latest steps ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/" | grep "^d" | sort -t'-' -k1 -n | tail -8

echo ""
echo "=== Pipe drainer running? ==="
ps aux | grep "LIBPID\|drt2_pipe\|pipe_path" | grep -v grep | head -5

echo ""
echo "=== Pipe drain log ==="
wc -l /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null
tail -20 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== OpenROAD status ==="
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "CPU:"$3"%","TIME:"$10}'
